The process

Four steps.
One less thing to worry about.

We have made this as easy as possible. Because you have got enough on your plate already.

No jargon. No complicated briefs. Just a clear, fast process from payment to launch.

1

Enquire and pay

Get in touch, confirm your package, and complete payment.

2

Fill out your brief

We send you the brief form after payment. Fill it in once. We build from your answers.

Preview ready within 24 hours
3

Review and request changes

Take a look, request one round of small tweaks, and we will make them.

4

Your site goes live

Once you are happy, we connect your domain and your website is open for business.

"Your business, ready for the world."

Eve and her son.

About Eve

Built from experience,
not theory

I started my first business at 20. Working for myself was never a choice, it was just who I was.

Then life shifted. I became a solo mum and the sole provider, and suddenly that independence carried a very different kind of weight.

I wasn't willing to spend my life stuck between earning money and actually living it. I wanted freedom, flexibility, and something that worked on my terms.

So I figured it out.

And in the process, I realised how many women are in the same position — capable, driven, full of ideas, but stuck at the starting line because getting online feels overwhelming, expensive, or too technical.

That's why Built By Her exists.

To give women a fast, affordable way to show up professionally, get their business online, and start attracting clients, without the stress, the tech, or the endless back and forth.

Not someday. Now. I am here to help.
